task_completion.description: Generate and analyze NACA 4412 airfoil at Re=1,000,000 with 360-degree polar extrapolation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Software interface (e.g., QBlade) showing 'NACA 4412', Reynolds number of 1,000,000 (or 1e6), and 360-degree polar extrapolation settings or results.

task_completion.description: Design a 3-bladed rotor with 10m radius and specified linear geometry distribution.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blade design table or interface showing 3 blades, 10m radius, and a linear distribution from Root (Chord=1.5, Twist=10) to Tip (Chord=0.5, Twist=0).

task_completion.description: Perform BEM simulation to identify optimal TSR and max Cp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Simulation results, such as a graph or table showing Power Coefficient (Cp) versus Tip Speed Ratio (TSR).
File manager showing 'rpm_study.wpa' in the /home/ga/Documents/projects/ directory, or the software title bar displaying this file path.

task_completion.description: Record Optimal TSR, Max Cp, and Optimal RPM in optimal_rpm_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor showing 'optimal_rpm_report.txt' in the correct directory, containing recorded values for Optimal TSR, Max Cp, and the calculated Optimal RPM for 12 m/s.

integrity.description: Agent used actual wind turbine design software (like QBlade) for the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the software's GUI (menus, dialogs, graphs) rather than just writing text files or using terminal commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The values in the report match the simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Optimal TSR and Max Cp values recorded in the text report correspond to the peaks shown in the BEM simulation graphs.

integrity.description: Agent did not just guess or hardcode the expected answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually ran the BEM simulation to get the results before writing them to the report, rather than creating the report immediately.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target wind speed: 12.0 m/s. Target radius: 10.0 m. Expected project path: /home/ga/Documents/projects/rpm_study.wpa. Expected report path: /home/ga/Documents/projects/optimal_rpm_report.txt. Airfoil: NACA 4412. Optimal TSR for NACA 4412 is typically around 6-7, and max Cp is around 0.5-0.56. RPM is calculated as RPM = (TSR × V / R) × (60 / 2π), where V=12 and R=10.
